concept: My Screen Time Report Is None Of My Business
title: My Screen Time Report Is None Of My Business Shirt, Funny Phone Addiction Tee, Millennial Burnout Humor Gift
description:
Every Sunday, your phone sends a tiny performance review and suddenly you are in a toxic relationship with your own screen.
This one is for the chronically online, mildly ashamed, wildly self aware crowd who call doomscrolling "winding down."

A little sarcastic, a little too real, and painfully wearable, this tee turns modern digital guilt into a joke you can laugh at before opening the weekly report you absolutely did not ask for. It is the perfect uniform for coffee runs, couch rotting, pretending you are "just checking one thing," and anyone whose thumbs are doing the most.

Perfect for:
- doomscrollers, app hoppers, and people personally attacked by screen time notifications
- millennial and gen z friends who treat their phone like an emotional support rectangle
- remote workers, students, and overthinkers with 47 unread texts and zero intention of replying today
- funny birthdays, casual office laughs, group chat gifts, and everyday chaos dressing

DETAILS:
- Fit: easygoing everyday unisex vibes that look equally good with jeans, joggers, or your favorite stay home pants.
- Two print variants: a dark ink version for light shirts and a bright high contrast version for dark shirts, so the joke hits either way.
- What is on the shirt: bold stacked text reading "MY SCREEN TIME REPORT IS NONE OF MY BUSINESS" with a minimalist side eye phone and judgmental weekly report bubble.
- Made to order: printed just for you, because apparently one weekly report was not enough tracking.

Product features
• 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
• Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
• Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
• Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
• Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Care instructions
• Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
• Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
• Tumble dry: low heat
• Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
• Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
